steps.title: Find the remaining resistance
steps.content:
The total resistance is $120$ ohms, and two resistors together have resistance $75$ ohms. The other three resistors together have resistance
$$120-75=45$$

steps.title: Apply the positivity condition
steps.content: Let the three remaining resistors have resistances $x$, $r$, and $s$. $$x+r+s=45$$ Each resistance is positive, so $x>0$. Also, $r+s$ must be positive, which means $$45-x>0$$ Thus $x<45$. The answer is B.
